title: VscodeUpdate
description: VS Code workspace detection payload. Delta model — only changed fields are sent after the initial snapshot.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the open workspace or folder root; null when VS Code is not running or no folder is open

project_name.description: Derived project name (typically the workspace folder's basename); null when unavailable

active_file.description: Absolute path to the currently focused editor file; null when no file is active

branch.description: Current git branch of the VS Code workspace; null when not in a git repo or unavailable
